headline: Club Med St. Croix Redevelopment Might Change The Case For Investing In VICI Properties (VICI)
summary: Earlier in June 2026, Club Med and VICI Properties Inc. announced that VICI acquired the Carambola Beach Resort in the U.S. Virgin Islands and entered a long-term triple-net lease, under which VICI will fund a full redevelopment to Club Med’s Exclusive Collection standards while Club Med operates the 150-key property. The project aims to create a flagship sustainable, all-inclusive resort that supports local employment and economic activity through BREEAM and Green Globe-aligned...
